mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_analysis (user_id, analysis_id, conversation_content, status, error_message, processing_time_ms, educational_summary, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{analysisId}, #{conversationContent}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{processingTimeMs}, #{educationalSummary}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, analysis_id, conversation_content, status, error_message, processing_time_ms, educational_summary, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation_analysis WHERE analysis_id = #{analysisId}
